div.h1: Variable-Length Input Padding and Attention Masking

div.p: Request A: [T1] [T2] [T3] [T4] [T5] [PAD] [PAD] [PAD] Request B: [T1] [T2] [T3] [T4] [T5] [T6] [T7] [T8] Request C: [T1] [T2] [T3] [PAD] [PAD] [PAD] [PAD] [PAD]
🟢 Real Token: mask=1, attends to others ⚪ PAD Token: mask=0, ignored by attention Padding Overhead: (8-5) + (8-8) + (8-3) = 8 tokens Efficiency: 16 real / 24 total = 66.7%
Token 1 can attend to: T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 Token 1 cannot attend to: PAD, PAD, PAD Weights: [0.20, 0.20, 0.20, 0.20, 0.20, 0.00, 0.00, 0.00]
